2328860.name: Emerald Isle
2328860.description: Welcome to "Emerald Isle", a pixel art video game inspired by ancient mythological Ireland. Explore lush environments, battle monsters with weapons and magical abilities, and uncover the secrets of the land. With its immersive storytelling, memorable characters, and pixel-perfect graphics, "Emerald Isle" is a must-play action-adventure game for fans of Irish mythology. So grab your sword, summon your courage, and become a hero of ancient Ireland!
2328860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
